channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria and South Africa Face a Critical Test as Economic Reforms Aim to Restore Growth
item.description: Nigeria and South Africa, the two biggest economies in Africa, are entering an important period as both countries try to recover from years of economic and structural challenges. For more than a decad...

item.title: Integrated Valleytronics Chip Demonstrates On-Chip Generation, Routing, and Detection of Light-Based Information
item.description: Researchers at Monash University have developed a compact photonic chip capable of generating, directing, and detecting information carried by light within a single integrated device. The breakthrough...

item.title: Rubio Clashes With Senator Rosen Over His Role During Pakistan-Iran Peace Negotiations
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio engaged in a heated exchange with Senator Jacky Rosen of Nevada during a Senate Foreign Relations Committee hearing focused on the administration's handling of negotiati...

item.title: Former DHS Chief of Staff Criticizes Markwayne Mullin's Proposal to Disrupt Airport Operations in Sanctuary Cities
item.description: Newly confirmed Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin has faced immediate criticism over his first major policy proposal. The former Oklahoma senator suggested interfering with ai...

item.title: Analysts Debate How Trump's Second Term Could Change After the 2026 Midterm Elections
item.description: A Raw Story article examines concerns raised by political commentator Molly Jong-Fast and journalist Greg Sargent about the potential direction of President Donald Trump's second term after the 2026 m...

item.title: Senate Questions U.S. State Department on Withheld Legal Memo Justifying War Against Iran
item.description: During a Senate Foreign Relations Committee hearing, U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio was questioned by Senator Tim Kaine about the Trump administration’s refusal to provide Congress with a key leg...

item.title: Former Homeland Security official claims Trump is under increased political pressure following recent setbacks
item.description: A former senior official from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security has suggested that President Donald Trump is showing signs of heightened political strain following a series of recent setbacks. ...

item.title: Controversy erupts over Michael Flynn’s foreign lobbying work and Russia-linked political ties
item.description: The article reports on backlash and discussion within conservative and pro-Trump circles after retired Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, former National Security Adviser to Donald Trump, registered as a foreign...

item.title: Lidice Memorial Honors Child Victims of Nazi Massacre in WWII
item.description: The Memorial to the Child Victims of War is a powerful bronze sculpture located at the Lidice Memorial in Lidice, Czech Republic. It commemorates the 82 children from the village of Lidice who were mu...

item.title: ACT public schools to close on 11 June as teachers plan second strike amid ongoing pay dispute
item.description: ACT public schools will close for a full day on 11 June as teachers prepare for a second round of industrial action in an ongoing dispute over pay, working conditions and school resources. Education D...

item.title: Eagles trade A.J. Brown to Patriots for future draft capital, citing long-term value of first-round picks
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have traded wide receiver A.J. Brown to the New England Patriots in exchange for a 2028 first-round draft pick and a 2027 fifth-round selection. Following the deal, Eagles gene...

item.title: Conservative criticism grows over Trump’s appointment of housing official William Pulte as acting intelligence chief
item.description: Donald Trump’s decision to appoint William J. Pulte, the director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, as acting Director of National Intelligence has sparked criticism from conservative commentator...

item.title: Senator Jinggoy Estrada arraigned in graft case, enters not guilty plea
item.description: Senator Jinggoy Estrada appeared in court for his formal arraignment in a graft case, where he was officially informed of the charges against him. During the proceedings, Estrada entered a plea of not...

item.title: Rick Wilson Criticizes Trump Supporters After DOJ Abandons Proposed Jan. 6 Compensation Fund
item.description: The article reports on reactions to the apparent cancellation of a proposed federal compensation program that would have benefited individuals involved in the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot. According ...

item.title: Ex-Trump Ambassador Gordon Sondland Corrects Conservative Terry Schilling on CNN Regarding Israel-Iran Dynamics
item.description: On CNN This Morning, anti-trans activist Terry Schilling joined a panel discussing President Donald Trump's reported tense conversation with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu amid ongoing conf...

item.title: Rehabilitation of Ludewa–Lumbiji road improves year-round transport and market access in Morogoro
item.description: The Tanzania Rural and Urban Roads Agency (TARURA) has successfully completed the rehabilitation of the 21-kilometre Ludewa–Lumbiji rural road in Kilosa District, Morogoro Region, as part of the natio...

item.title: Report: GOP lawmakers increasingly resist Trump as political influence weakens after primaries
item.description: A recent Punchbowl News report highlights growing resistance within the Republican Party toward President Donald Trump, suggesting that his political influence over allies in Congress is weakening. Ac...

item.title: Questions raised over New Mexico officials' handling of former prosecutor linked to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: A report has sparked renewed scrutiny in New Mexico over former U.S. attorney John J. Kelly, who has been linked to Jeffrey Epstein through previously undisclosed connections. Kelly, who served as U.S...

item.title: New lawsuit challenges Trump-era $1.8B anti-weaponization fund linked to January 6 prosecutions
item.description: Former White House ethics official Norman Eisen has filed a new federal lawsuit seeking to block what he and his co-plaintiffs describe as a controversial $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund tied t...

item.title: Tanzania 2026/27 Transport Budget Focuses on SGR Expansion and Regional Logistics Development
item.description: Tanzania’s Ministry of Transport has presented a TZS 2.87 trillion budget for the 2026/27 financial year, with a strong focus on transforming the country into a regional logistics hub for Eastern, Cen...
